resources.string: Camera permission is required to continue. You can enable it in Settings.
This app needs camera access so you can take photos.
Camera permission is required to use this app. Enable it in Settings.
This app needs microphone access so you can record videos.
Microphone access is optional and only needed for video recording.
Microphone permission denied. Photo capture still works.
Microphone permission is disabled. Enable it in Settings to record videos.
Allow media access to show photos in your gallery sheet.
You allowed access to selected photos only. Some items may be hidden.
Gallery access is off. You can still use the camera and grant media access when needed.
